name: Coconut Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup granulated sugar (plus more to top)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
Sift together flour, 1 cup granulated sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl. Set aside.
Combine brown sugar, shortening, eggs, and vanilla extract; beat well with an electric mixer.
Stir the mixture into the flour mixture until combined.
Stir in oats, walnuts, and coconut. The dough will be slightly dry.
Roll the dough into small balls and dip their tops in granulated sugar.
Place the cookies on an ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake for 12 to 14 minutes. Let the cookies remain on the sheet for 1 to 2 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack.
Yield: About 5 1/2 dozen cookies.
